name: veritio
description: Local Veritio CLI for Workbench and MCP development.

scripts.build: bun run --cwd ../sdks/typescript build && bun run --cwd ../server/node build && node ../node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd ../sdks/typescript build && bun run --cwd ../server/node build && node ../node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: bun run --cwd ../sdks/typescript build && bun run --cwd ../server/node build && bun test src
